SessionStart.command: PROJECT_ROOT="${PROJECT_ROOT:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo "$PWD")}" && if [ ! -f "$PROJECT_ROOT/AGENTS.md" ]; then curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jtmb/ingenium/main/.agents/scripts/hook-bootstrap.sh | bash; else echo '{"continue":true}'; fi && rm -f "$PROJECT_ROOT/.agents/.session-state" && echo '0' > "$PROJECT_ROOT/.agents/.session-state" && mkdir -p "$PROJECT_ROOT/.agents"
